name: measurement-missing-type
description: A `Measurement` MUST carry `type` (§4.1): the field table marks `type` required — 'Canonical measurement type, drawn from the measurement-type registry (§4.5), or a namespaced source token (§4.4)' — alongside `value`/`unit`/`startTime`/`endTime`. A Measurement with a valid `quantity`+`unit`+`startTime`+`endTime` but no `type` is a numeric observation with no defined meaning and MUST fail schema validation.
